snapshots.commit_message: Begin parsing of vb6 class files. Pushing parsers into vb6.rs
Added support for creating forms with FillColor instead of using default.
Compilation settings are now nested under CompileType in VB6ProjectType.
Built basic ParserResult success/failure carrying structure.
basic outline of vb6code parsing without winnow and using sourcestream finished.
Fixed cargo doc test for class parsing.
Added class header tokens as well as EOF token.
Added OnKeyword and changed Comment to EndOfLineComment
snapshots.benchmark_note: cargo bench failed: no variant, associated function, or constant named `Comment` found for enum `VB6Token` in the current scope | no variant, associated function, or constant named `Comment` found for enum `tokens::VB6Token` in the current scope

snapshots.commit_message: Added further documentation to ParseResult
fixed module documentation
First pass at getting the CST parsing component into the playground.
snapshots.benchmark_note: cargo bench succeeded but no Criterion estimates were found.

snapshots.commit_message: Removed config.toml which made development easier during playground work.
Oh look, there was bit rot since the examples hadn't been run before. updated!
Removed ADM-TSC-Tools-ALM-QC submodule. It contained a bunch of VBA code, not VB6. We might use it later, but probably not. We definitely don't need it right now though.
Added invalid syntax tests for projects.
backtick documentation fix.
Lots and lots and lots of clippy fixes.
octothorpe at based parsing should be correctly consumed and accepted. This is precursor to preprocessor declarations.
not sure why I put 'Step' there, but this makes better sense. probably was planning a step on the while and got distracted.
Support for colon operator to allow multiple statements on the same line.
Improved support for empty arguments in call statements/expressions (mainly, fixed that an empty first argument parses correctly)
Fixed MemberAccessExpression being missed for IdentifierExpression, mostly around ExclamationMark checks.
Added module level check for semicolon error failure in non print like call for separator.
Removed eprintln and changed it over to report_error
Updated the cargo dependencies
updated cargo.toml for profiling with samply
fixed issues with criterion processing of form_files benchmark
switched to phf map and this *should* accelerate take_keyword mapping performance. Also fixed bug where we were searching for "adressof" instead of "addressof"
switched from a phf lookup to a 2 char peek match, then a single char match for the secondary pass. We are seeing a 50%-100% speed up in benchmarks
Modified newline parsing to get slight performance improvement. roughly 15% improvement.
clippy const warning fix.
fixed class_files benchmark to make the sampling better.
performance improvement for extract_properties using shallow copy children() navigation.
performance improvement in all my children/ and children_kind iterators.
performance improvement by switching over to the new children_by_kind filtered children function.
improved layout of bars in coverage charting.
Added charting for historical performance trends.
removed legacy script mention since the legacy scripts have been long deleted.
Backfill benchmark history to make it easier to see in the new historical performance trend chart.
Fixed issue with argument passing modifiers in Declare/API calls failing (ie, ByVal and ByRef)
Break up parse_prefix_expression_nonrecursive into sub components with a bit nicer name.
Updated documentation and converted all functions to new naming/usage conventions
Fixed parsing issue with LongLiterals and leading and trailing literal indicators.
Fixed bug with incorrectly processing bracketed enum based identifiers in call or identifier expression parsing.
Removed string allocation from parse_control_type_direct which should provide a significant speed up.
fixed clippy warnings
updated to newer version of insta a while ago, and this yaml output bug is fixed. Also, fixed project parser to use BTreeMap so inner hash remains stable.
No longer have a stack overflow issue on this one.
Added fast path quick no-op path as well as fast path kind checking
Updated ignore message on now working test.
updated version of insta in wasm build
Updated documentation and the code the documentation reads to generate it.
